MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Pro Tem Judge: Junji Suzuki, Clerk: M. Vallejo.
Case was not reported.
Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq., for Plaintiff Martin Luther King/Marcus Garvey Square Coop.
Defendants: Jaqueline Loville and Hasan Loville present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation that was signed by the parties, but not read into the record.
Judgement pursuant to stipulation filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
